subject: Sale Extended One Day Only! Last Chance to Save 50% on a Times Subscription.
body:

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

SALE EXTENDED!

50% OFF FOR 26 WEEKS ON A TIMES SUBSCRIPTION

TODAY ONLY

ACT NOW
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBThbOnB81HXJB86TTEAAwENcca/sub01

DON'T MISS OUR SPECIAL MEMORIAL DAY SALE

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com. 

*This sale expires on May 29, 2014, 9 a.m. ET. 

Does not include Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital
versions of The New York Times Crossword. Home Delivery promotional
offer valid for new subscribers in areas served by The New York Times
Delivery Service. After your introductory period, your subscription will
continue at the regular rate, unless you notify us otherwise. State and
local taxes will be added where applicable. Other restrictions apply.

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.
